holdings.infoBox: ONEY is an equity ETF with a total of 301 individual holdings. The top holdings are United Parcel Service stock at 2.23%, Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company at 1.89%, Target at 1.84%, EOG Resources at 1.64%, and SLB N.V. at 1.61%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Russell 1000 Yield Focus ETF (ONEY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 1000 Yield Focused Factor index. The fund tracks an index of large-cap stocks from the Russell 1000 Index, selected and weighted by four factors that are scaled by market cap. ONEY was launched on Dec 2, 2015 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: 3 Dividend-Stock ETFs That Are Flying Under the Radar
data.text: High-yielding names you might have overlooked.
